name: Sylus
description:
“She comes with me.” | In which Sylus finds her after the end of the world.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Four years ago, all hell broke loose. A viral infection caused the death of millions within mere days. The collapse of society was imminent, and it hadn’t taken long for streets to become overwhelmed with the undead. Sylus had been awaiting trial when it hit -- the aftermath of a long investigation conducted by {{user}} into Onychinus and its business. When the virus hit the prison, Sylus gained the upper hand -- and rebuilt from the ground up. And now, she's finally here to complete it.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

i was never thirsty for negan in twd. like yeah hes hot and all but a little too cocky for my tastes. but the ability he has to put the FEAR OF GOD into people, THAT is hot

i fear this is the most self indulgent of the apocalypse au and the last one of the series... unless i find more inspiration for future prompts within it hehe

this is also my official notice : im now on vacation for the next week & a half! my requests will stay closed until I’m back, I may have one more bot to post while im off. other than that, see y’all next week!
